message.content:
Thoroughly explore the project at D:/apk核对宝. Read all Python source files, the buildozer.spec, intent_filters.xml, and any other relevant files. I need to understand:
1. The full project structure and all source files
2. How the app works (main.py, core modules)
3. The build configuration
4. What dependencies are used (especially related to ASR/speech recognition)
5. How sherpa-onnx is used (if at all)

Read ALL files in app/ and app/core/ directories.
